remote patient monitoring, defined as the collection of physiologic data (for example, 
ECG, blood pressure, glucose monitoring) digitally stored and/or transmitted by the 
patient or caregiver or both to the home health agency; teletypewriter (TTY) technology; 
and 2-way audio-video telecommunications technology that allows for real-time
